title: Warriors of the Wind
posterAlt: Warriors of the Wind (1984) movie poster
tmdbOverview: After a global war, the seaside kingdom known as the Valley of the Wind remains one of the last strongholds on Earth untouched by a poisonous jungle and the powerful insects that guard it. Led by the courageous Princess Nausicaä, the people of the Valley engage in an epic struggle to restore the bond between humanity and Earth.
synopsis: Warriors of the Wind (1984) is a adventure, animation and fantasy film from Japan. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.0 on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a PG certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
